gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics for all community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest usage and health data.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the Monitor Robot checking on plants (apps) in a greenhouse, representing the automated bot updating app health metrics.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot watering code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. The robot holds a tiny clipboard checking metrics. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and the tiny bee mascot watering code-plants in a digital greenhouse.
